expected_signals.summary: vLLM published patch release v0.22.1 with targeted bug fixes and select additions.
The release added model support for JetBrains Mellum v2.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: Model support expanded with JetBrains Mellum v2

expected_signals.summary: DeepSeek-V4 initialization had a CUTLASS compatibility issue that was fixed in this release.
OlmoHybridForCausalLM loading was corrected after upstream checkpoint changes to rope_parameters.
HyperCLOVAX was registered to use vLLM's vendored config when transformers versions lack remote code support.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: registered to use vLLM's vendored config

expected_signals.summary: AMD Zen CPU inference paths were optimized through zentorch kernels with transparent fallback.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: through zentorch kernels with transparent fallback

expected_signals.summary: A deterministic hang in multi-node Ray data-parallel serving was fixed by excluding the Ray backend from deferred port allocation.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: fixed a deterministic hang in multi-node Ray data-parallel serving

expected_signals.summary: Build and CI fixes addressed installation quarantine and CUDA compatibility issues.

notes: Release-note extraction task only. No runnable verifier applies because the output is a judgment-based JSON label set derived directly from the provided text, not executable behavior.
